name: mawile
flavor_text: MAWHILE’s huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed. Its docile-looking face serves to lull its foe into letting down its guard. When the foe least expects it, MAWHILE chomps it with its gaping jaws.

moves.name: growl
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: astonish
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: bite
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: stockpile
moves.effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.

moves.name: spit-up
moves.effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.

moves.name: swallow
moves.effect: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.

moves.name: vice-grip
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: feint-attack
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: iron-defense
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: crunch
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: sweet-scent
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: iron-head
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: fake-tears
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: assurance
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: body-slam
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: dark-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: draining-kiss
moves.effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: embargo
moves.effect: Target cannot use held items.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: false-swipe
moves.effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.

moves.name: fire-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: flamethrower
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: flash-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: focus-punch
moves.effect: If the user takes damage before attacking, the attack is canceled.

moves.name: foul-play
moves.effect: Calculates damage with the target’s attacking stat.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: ice-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: incinerate
moves.effect: Destroys the target’s held berry.

moves.name: mega-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: mega-punch
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: natural-gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the held berry.

moves.name: payback
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: rock-slide
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: rock-smash
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: rock-tomb
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: sandstorm
moves.effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: solar-beam
moves.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

moves.name: stealth-rock
moves.effect: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.

moves.name: stone-edge
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: strength
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thunder-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: torment
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: ancient-power
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.

moves.name: captivate
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages if it’s the opposite gender.

moves.name: fire-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: guard-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.

moves.name: ice-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: metal-burst
moves.effect: Strikes back at the last Pokémon to hit the user this turn with 1.5× the damage.

moves.name: misty-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.

moves.name: poison-fang
moves.effect: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

moves.name: punishment
moves.effect: Power increases against targets with more raised stats, up to a maximum of 200.

moves.name: seismic-toss
moves.effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.

moves.name: slam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: sucker-punch
moves.effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.

moves.name: thunder-fang
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: tickle
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: counter
moves.effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last physical hit it took.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: dynamic-punch
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.

moves.name: last-resort
moves.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: mimic
moves.effect: Copies the target’s last used move.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: snatch
moves.effect: Steals the target’s move, if it’s self-targeted.

moves.name: super-fang
moves.effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.

abilitiesDetailed.name: hyper-cutter
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.

abilitiesDetailed.name: intimidate
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sheer-force
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.
